title: Study in Canada as an international student - Canada.ca
content:
## Study in Canada as an international student
Apply to study in Canada as an international student, extend your study permit and find out about working while you study or after you graduate.
- Sign in to your study permit account
- Find a school (designated learning institution)
- Get a post-graduation work permit
- Change your school or program
- Work as an international student or recent graduate
- Information for Canadian schools

### Find out if you need a study permit
Answer a few questions to learn whether you need a study permit to study in Canada

### Choosing a school, college or university
The different kinds of schools, when to apply and other requirements

### Learn about student life in Canada
Tips on applying for scholarships, living in Canada as an international student and more

## Apply for a study permit
Who can apply, how to apply, processing times and what to expect when you get to Canada

### Study in Canada as a graduate student New
How to get your master’s or doctoral degree in Canada, apply to come to Canada with your family, and get faster processing as a doctoral student

### Study in Canada as a minor child
Find out what is required for a minor child who is not a Canadian citizen or permanent resident to study in Canada

### Programs you might be interested in
- Study as a French-speaking student
- Indigenous border mobility measures

## Extend or update the conditions on your study permit

### Extend your study permit or restore your status
How to renew your study permit or restore your status

### Your study permit conditions
Learn about your study permit conditions and keep your contact information up to date
As of November 8, 2024, you can no longer change schools on the same study permit. If you want to change schools, you need to get a new study permit by applying to extend your current one. Learn more about changing schools .

## Working and travelling while you study

### Work while you study
Discover if you can work while studying, how much and where (on campus, off campus, and student work placements)

### Get a visitor visa to return to Canada
How and when a study permit holder should apply

### Traveling outside Canada while you study
What you need to re-enter Canada as an International Student

### Post graduation work permit (PGWP)
Stay and work in Canada after you graduate

### Explore immigration programs
Answer a few questions to see different ways you might be able to come to Canada

### Virtual sessions about pathways to permanent residence
Register for a session to learn about pathways to stay in Canada after you graduate

## For Canadian schools

### Designated learning institutions in Canada
Become a DLI, enrol in the portal, submit compliance reports
